languages.text: "Я знаю, что ты веришь в меня, капитан, но кто поможет твоему полку, если я тут погибну? Кто кроме тебя даст им надежду на искупление?"
"I know you believe in me, captain, but who will aid your regiment if I perish here? Who besides you can grant them hope for atonement?"
languages.original_text: "Я знаю, что ты веришь в меня, капитан, но кто поможет твоему полку, если я тут погибну? Кто кроме тебя даст им надежду на искупление?"

traits.locale_text: "I know you believe in me, Captain, but who will aid your regiment if I perish here? Who besides you can grant them a hope for atonement?"
"I know you believe in me, captain, but who will aid your regiment if I perish here? Who besides you can grant them hope for atonement?"
"I do not doubt your abilities, Captain. But the battle for the soul of the regiment must be won back in the settlement, not here."
"I know you believe in me, Captain, but who will aid your regiment if I perish here? Who besides you can grant them a hope for atonement?"
"I know you believe in me, captain, but who will aid your regiment if I perish here? Who besides you can grant them hope for atonement?"

languages.text: 「あなたの能力には疑いはない、隊長。しかし、連隊の魂をかけた戦いは、ここではなく、この町で取り戻さなければならない」
languages.original_text: "I do not doubt your abilities, Captain. But the battle for the soul of the regiment must be won back in the settlement, not here."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの能力には疑いはありません、隊長。しかし、連隊の魂をかけた戦いは、ここではなく、この町で取り戻さなければなりません。」

languages.text: "Bana inandığınızı biliyorum yüzbaşı ama burada ölürsem alayınıza kim yardım edecek? Onlara sizden başka kim kefaret umudu verebilir?"
languages.original_text: "I know you believe in me, captain, but who will aid your regiment if I perish here? Who besides you can grant them hope for atonement?"

traits.locale_text: "Bana inandığınızı biliyorum yüzbaşı ama burada ölürsem alayınıza kim yardım edecek? Onlara sizden başka kim kefaret umudu verebilir?"

languages.text: «Sé que confía en mí, capitana, pero ¿quién ayudará a su regimiento si muero aquí? ¿Quién, si no usted, puede darles esperanza para su expiación?».
languages.original_text: "I know you believe in me, captain, but who will aid your regiment if I perish here? Who besides you can grant them hope for atonement?"

traits.locale_text: «Sé que confía en mí, capitana, pero ¿quién ayudará a su regimiento si muero aquí? ¿Quién, si no usted, puede darles esperanza para su expiación?».

languages.text: “我知道你信任我，上尉。但如果我死在这里，谁来帮助你的军团？除了你，还有谁能给他们带来赎罪的希望？”
languages.original_text: "I know you believe in me, captain, but who will aid your regiment if I perish here? Who besides you can grant them hope for atonement?"

traits.locale_text: “我知道你信任我，上尉。但如果我死在这里，谁来帮助你的军团？除了你，还有谁能给他们带来赎罪的希望？”

languages.text: « Je sais que vous croyez en moi, capitaine, mais qui aidera votre régiment si je péris ici ? Qui d'autre que vous pourra lui donner l'espoir de l'expiation ? »
languages.original_text: "I know you believe in me, captain, but who will aid your regiment if I perish here? Who besides you can grant them hope for atonement?"

traits.locale_text: « Je sais que vous croyez en moi, capitaine, mais qui aidera votre régiment si je péris ici ? Qui d'autre que vous pourra lui donner l'espoir de l'expiation ? »

languages.text: "Ich weiß, Ihr glaubt an mich, Captain, aber wer wird Euer Regiment unterstützen, falls ich hier sterbe? Wer außer Euch kann ihm Hoffnung auf Erlösung geben?"
languages.original_text: "I know you believe in me, captain, but who will aid your regiment if I perish here? Who besides you can grant them hope for atonement?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß, Ihr glaubt an mich, Captain, aber wer wird Euer Regiment unterstützen, falls ich hier sterbe? Wer außer Euch kann ihm Hoffnung auf Erlösung geben?"
